name: Virgin Galactic Holdings, Inc
business: Virgin Galactic is an aerospace and space travel company that provides human spaceflight services. It offers spaceflight experiences for private individuals, researchers, and government agencies. The company also performs engineering services for third parties.

exposures.sentence: We are an aerospace and space travel company, pioneering human-first spaceflight for private individuals, researchers, and government agencies with its advanced and highly re-useable spaceships and high-altitude carrier aircraft.

catalysts.event: Commence test flights of next-generation spaceships
catalysts.sentence: We expect to commence test flights of our next-generation spaceships in the third quarter of 2026, in advance of restarting commercial service which is expected to occur in the fourth quarter of 2026 with a research flight.
We expect private astronaut spaceflights to commence six to eight weeks after our first commercial spaceflight.
